Scattered patch of tart, tannic, but flavorful apples and pears. Great for cider, less so for fresh eating. Probably bird planted. Accessible from Chip Ross Park--bit of a hike with a big sack of apples, but it's a pretty one. Falling Fruit season: August-Octo
